name: North Star Metric Framework
what_it_is: Identifying the single metric capturing the core value your product delivers - the one metric that if it grows, means everything is working.
core_mechanic: Define the metric at intersection of user and business value. Map leading input metrics beneath it. Identify counter-metrics to prevent gaming.
when_to_use: Team optimizing different metrics and pulling in different directions / Entering a new product phase / No shared definition of success
when_not_to_use: Very early stage (need data to know what value delivered looks like) / Working on a feature not product strategy / Problem is execution not direction
ideaos_application: Agent 3 drafts a candidate North Star, maps 3 input metrics beneath it, identifies the counter-metric.
